title: SuggestionCard
description: Schema for suggestion cards in the BenchCore human review/UI benchmark. Cards represent AI-generated suggestions presented to a human reviewer.

card_id.description: Unique identifier for the suggestion card.

current_value.description: The current value before the suggestion (null if no current value exists).

rationale.description: Explanation of why this suggestion is being made.

content.description: The content of the suggestion card.

confidence.description: Confidence score for the suggestion (0.0 to 1.0).

source_ids.description: Source document references supporting this suggestion.

status.description: Current review status of the suggestion card.
